brief_html: This message was historically used to issue new values to the client for the above fields. New values were issued when the values supplied in SID_CLIENTID were found to be invalid.
format:
(UINT32) Registration Version
(UINT32) Registration Authority
(UINT32) Account Number
(UINT32) Registration Token
remarks_html:
This message was historically used to issue new values to the client for the above fields. New values were issued when the values supplied in SID_CLIENTID were found to be invalid.

Since these fields are no longer used, the server now sets them to zero.
